mapper.select:
SELECT /* CmnMdlAmtMgmtMapper.selectIntmMdlAmtList */ A.PRDT_ID /* 모델ID */ , A.RPRS_PRDT_ID /* 대표모델ID */ , A.RPRS_YN /* 대표여부 */ , A.PRDT_CODE /* 모델코드 */ , A.PRDT_NM /* 모델명 */ , A.MNFCT_ID /* 제조사ID */ , B.MNFCT_NM /* 제조사명 */ , A.PRDT_TYPE_CD /* 모델유형코드 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('ORG0007', PRDT_TYPE_CD) AS PRDT_TYPE_NM /* 모델유형명 */ , A.PRDT_IND_CD /* 모델구분코드 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0045', PRDT_IND_CD) AS PRDT_IND_NM /* 모델구분명 */ , A.PRDT_LNCH_DT /* 모델출시일자 */ , A.PRDT_DT /* 모델단종일자 */ , A.PRDT_COLR_CD /* 모델색상코드 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0044', PRDT_COLR_CD) AS PRDT_COLR_NM /* 모델색상명 */ , A.REG_ID /* 등록자ID */ , A.REG_DTTM /* 등록일시 */ , A.RVISN_ID /* 수정자ID */ , A.RVISN_DTTM /* 수정일시 */ FROM CMN_INTM_MDL A , ORG_MNFCT_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND A.MNFCT_ID = B.MNFCT_ID AND A.RPRS_YN = 'Y'
AND A.RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} /* 대표모델ID */
AND A.RPRS_PRDT_ID IN (SELECT RPRS_PRDT_ID FROM CMN_INTM_MDL WHERE PRDT_ID = #{prdtId})
AND A.MNFCT_ID = #{mnfctId} /* 제조사ID */
AND A.PRDT_TYPE_CD = #{prdtTypeCd} /* 모델유형코드 */
AND UPPER(A.PRDT_NM) like '%'||UPPER(#{prdtNm})||'%' /* 모델명 */
ORDER BY A.PRDT_DT DESC, A.PRDT_LNCH_DT DESC, A.RPRS_PRDT_ID DESC, A.PRDT_ID ASC

SELECT /* CmnMdlAmtMgmtMapper.selectMnfctAmtHisList */ A.RPRS_PRDT_ID /* 대표모델ID */ , C.PRDT_CODE AS RPRS_PRDT_CODE /* 대표모델코드 */ , C.PRDT_NM /* 모델명 */ , A.OLD_YN /* 중고여부 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('ORG0011', A.OLD_YN) AS OLD_YN_NM /* 중고여부명 */ , A.MNFCT_ID /* 제조사ID */ , B.MNFCT_NM /* 제조사명 */ , A.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM /* 단가만료일시 */ , A.UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM /* 단가적용일시 */ , A.IN_UNIT_PRIC /* 입고단가 */ , A.REMRK /* 비고 */ , A.REG_ID /* 등록자ID */ , A.REG_DTTM /* 등록일시 */ , A.RVISN_ID /* 수정자ID */ , A.RVISN_DTTM /* 수정일시 */ FROM CMN_MNFCT_AMT A /* 공급사단가 */ , CMN_INTM_MDL C , ORG_MNFCT_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND A.RPRS_PRDT_ID = C.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND C.RPRS_YN = 'Y' AND A.MNFCT_ID = B.MNFCT_ID(+) AND A.RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} ORDER BY A.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM DESC

SELECT /* CmnMdlAmtMgmtMapper.selectValCnt */ AMT.RPRS_PRDT_ID AS rprsPrdtId , AMT.OLD_YN AS oldYn , AMT.MNFCT_ID AS mnfctId , AMT.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM AS unitPricExprDttm , SUBSTR(AMT.UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM, 0, 8) AS unitPricApplDttm , COUNT(*) OVER() AS totalCnt FROM CMN_MNFCT_AMT AMT WHERE 1=1 AND AMT.RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} AND AMT.OLD_YN = #{oldYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AMT.MNFCT_ID = #{mnfctId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AMT.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM = '99991231235959' ORDER BY AMT.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE /* CmnMdlAmtMgmtMapper.updateMnfctAmt */ CMN_MNFCT_AMT SET RVISN_ID = #{rvisnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 수정자ID */ , RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE /* 수정일시 */ , UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{unitPricApplDttm, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') /* 단가적용일시 */ , IN_UNIT_PRIC = #{inUnitPric} /* 입고단가 */ , REMRK = #{remrk} /* 비고 */ WHERE 1=1 AND RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} /* 대표모델ID */ AND OLD_YN = #{oldYn} /* 중고여부 */ AND MNFCT_ID = #{mnfctId } /* 공급사ID */ AND UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM = '99991231235959' /* 단가만료일시 */

UPDATE /* CmnMdlAmtMgmtMapper.updateOldMnfctAmtExpire */ CMN_MNFCT_AMT SET RVISN_ID = #{rvisnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 수정자ID */ , RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE /* 수정일시*/ , UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{unitPricApplDttm, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')-1, 'YYYYMMDD')||'235959' /* 단가만료일시 */ WHERE 1=1 AND RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} /* 대표모델ID */ AND OLD_YN = #{oldYn} /* 중고여부 */ AND MNFCT_ID = #{mnfctId} /* 공급사ID */ AND UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM = (SELECT MAX(UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM) FROM CMN_MNFCT_AMT WHERE 1=1 AND RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} /* 대표모델ID */ AND OLD_YN = #{oldYn} /* 중고여부 */ AND MNFCT_ID = #{mnfctId} /* 공급사ID */ AND UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM <> '99991231235959' ) /* 단가만료일시 */

UPDATE /* CmnMdlAmtMgmtMapper.updateOldMnfctAmt */ CMN_MNFCT_AMT SET RVISN_ID = #{rvisnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 수정자ID */ , RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE /* 수정일시*/ , UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{unitPricApplDttm, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')-1, 'YYYYMMDD')||'235959' /* 단가만료일시 */ WHERE 1=1 AND RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} /* 대표모델ID */ AND OLD_YN = #{oldYn} /* 중고여부 */ AND MNFCT_ID = #{mnfctId } /* 공급사ID */ AND UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM = '99991231235959' /* 단가만료일시 */
mapper.select: SELECT /* CmnMdlAmtMgmtMapper.selectHndstAmtHisList */ A.RPRS_PRDT_ID /* 대표모델ID */ , B.PRDT_CODE AS RPRS_PRDT_CODE /* 대표모델코드 */ , B.PRDT_NM /* 모델명 */ , A.OLD_YN /* 중고여부 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('ORG0011', A.OLD_YN) AS OLD_YN_NM /* 중고여부명 */ , A.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM /* 단가만료일시 */ , A.UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM /* 단가적용일시 */ , A.OUT_UNIT_PRIC /* 출고단가 */ , A.MNFCT_GRANT /* 제조사장려금 */ , A.REMRK /* 비고 */ , A.REG_ID /* 등록자ID */ , A.REG_DTTM /* 등록일시 */ , A.RVISN_ID /* 수정자ID */ , A.RVISN_DTTM /* 수정일시 */ FROM CMN_HNDST_AMT A -- 제품단가 , CMN_INTM_MDL B WHERE 1=1 AND A.RPRS_PRDT_ID = B.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND B.RPRS_YN = 'Y' AND A.RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} ORDER BY A.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM DESC

SELECT /* CmnMdlAmtMgmtMapper.selectOldHndstAmt */ AMT.RPRS_PRDT_ID AS rprsPrdtId , AMT.OLD_YN AS oldYn , AMT.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM AS unitPricExprDttm , SUBSTR(AMT.UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM, 0, 8) AS unitPricApplDttm , COUNT(*) OVER() AS totalCnt FROM CMN_HNDST_AMT AMT WHERE 1=1 AND AMT.RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} AND AMT.OLD_YN = #{oldYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND AMT.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM = '99991231235959'
mapper.update: UPDATE /* CmnMdlAmtMgmtMapper.updateHndstAmt */ CMN_HNDST_AMT SET RVISN_ID = #{rvisnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 수정자ID */ , RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE /* 수정일시 */ , UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{unitPricApplDttm, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') /* 단가적용일시 */ , OUT_UNIT_PRIC = #{outUnitPric} /* 출고단가 */ , MNFCT_GRANT = #{mnfctGrant} /* 제조사장려금 */ , REMRK = #{remrk} /* 비고 */ WHERE 1=1 AND RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} /* 대표모델ID */ AND OLD_YN = #{oldYn} /* 중고여부 */ AND UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM = '99991231235959' /* 단가만료일시 */

UPDATE /* CmnMdlAmtMgmtMapper.updateOldHndstAmtExpire */ CMN_HNDST_AMT SET RVISN_ID = #{rvisnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 수정자ID */ , RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE /* 수정일시*/ , UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{unitPricApplDttm, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')-1, 'YYYYMMDD')||'235959' /* 단가만료일시 */ WHERE 1=1 AND RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} /* 대표모델ID */ AND OLD_YN = #{oldYn} /* 중고여부 */ AND UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM = (SELECT MAX(UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM) FROM CMN_HNDST_AMT WHERE 1=1 AND RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} /* 대표모델ID */ AND OLD_YN = #{oldYn} /* 중고여부 */ AND UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM <> '99991231235959' ) /* 단가만료일시 */

UPDATE /* CmnMdlAmtMgmtMapper.updateOldHndstAmt */ CMN_HNDST_AMT SET RVISN_ID = #{rvisnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} /* 수정자ID */ , RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE /* 수정일시*/ , UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{unitPricApplDttm, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')-1, 'YYYYMMDD')||'235959' /* 단가만료일시 */ WHERE 1=1 AND RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} /* 대표모델ID */ AND OLD_YN = #{oldYn} /* 중고여부 */ AND UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM = '99991231235959' /* 단가만료일시 */
mapper.select:
SELECT /* CmnMdlAmtMgmtMapper.selectRprsHndstAmtHisList */ A.PRDT_ID /* 모델ID */ , A.RPRS_PRDT_ID /* 대표모델ID */ , A.RPRS_YN /* 대표여부 */ , A.PRDT_CODE /* 모델코드 */ , (SELECT PRDT_CODE FROM CMN_INTM_MDL B WHERE B.PRDT_ID = A.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND RPRS_YN = 'Y') AS RPRS_PRDT_CODE /* 대표모델 코드*/ , A.PRDT_NM /* 모델명 */ , A.MNFCT_ID /* 제조사ID */ , C.MNFCT_NM /* 제조사명 */ , A.PRDT_TYPE_CD /* 모델유형코드 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('ORG0007', A.PRDT_TYPE_CD) AS PRDT_TYPE_NM /* 모델유형명 */ , A.PRDT_IND_CD /* 모델구분코드 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0045', A.PRDT_IND_CD) AS PRDT_IND_NM /* 모델구분명 */ , A.PRDT_LNCH_DT /* 모델출시일자 */ , A.PRDT_DT /* 모델단종일자 */ , A.PRDT_COLR_CD /* 모델색상코드 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0044', A.PRDT_COLR_CD) AS PRDT_COLR_NM /* 모델색상명 */ , B.OLD_YN /* 중고여부 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('ORG0011', B.OLD_YN) AS OLD_YN_NM /* 중고여부명 */ , B.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM /* 단가만료일시 */ , B.UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM /* 단가적용일시 */ , B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC /* 출고단가 */ , B.MNFCT_GRANT /* 제조사장려금 */ , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'ORG0018' AND CD_VAL = '1') AS MAX_AMT /* 정책보조금 */ , B.REMRK /* 비고 */ FROM CMN_INTM_MDL A , CMN_HNDST_AMT B , ORG_MNFCT_MST C WHERE 1=1 AND A.RPRS_PRDT_ID = B.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND A.MNFCT_ID = C.MNFCT_ID AND A.PRDT_DT >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND ((A.RPRS_YN = 'N' AND PRDT_TYPE_CD = '01') OR (A.RPRS_YN = 'Y' AND PRDT_TYPE_CD <> '01') ) AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN SUBSTR(B.UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM, 0, 8 ) AND SUBSTR(B.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM, 0, 8 )
AND A.RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} /* 대표모델ID */
AND A.PRDT_ID = #{prdtId}
AND A.MNFCT_ID = #{mnfctId} /* 제조사ID */
AND A.PRDT_TYPE_CD = #{prdtTypeCd} /* 모델유형코드 */
AND B.OLD_YN = #{oldYn} /* 중고여부 */
AND UPPER(A.PRDT_NM) like '%'||UPPER(#{prdtNm})||'%' /* 모델명 */
ORDER BY A.PRDT_DT DESC, A.PRDT_LNCH_DT DESC, A.RPRS_PRDT_ID DESC, A.PRDT_ID ASC

SELECT /* CmnMdlAmtMgmtMapper.selectRprsHndstAmtAllHisList */ A.PRDT_ID /* 모델ID */ , A.RPRS_PRDT_ID /* 대표모델ID */ , A.RPRS_YN /* 대표여부 */ , A.PRDT_CODE /* 모델코드 */ , (SELECT PRDT_CODE FROM CMN_INTM_MDL B WHERE B.PRDT_ID = A.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND RPRS_YN = 'Y') AS RPRS_PRDT_CODE /* 대표모델 코드*/ , A.PRDT_NM /* 모델명 */ , A.MNFCT_ID /* 제조사ID */ , C.MNFCT_NM /* 제조사명 */ , A.PRDT_TYPE_CD /* 모델유형코드 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('ORG0007', A.PRDT_TYPE_CD) AS PRDT_TYPE_NM /* 모델유형명 */ , A.PRDT_IND_CD /* 모델구분코드 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0045', A.PRDT_IND_CD) AS PRDT_IND_NM /* 모델구분명 */ , A.PRDT_LNCH_DT /* 모델출시일자 */ , A.PRDT_DT /* 모델단종일자 */ , A.PRDT_COLR_CD /* 모델색상코드 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0044', A.PRDT_COLR_CD) AS PRDT_COLR_NM /* 모델색상명 */ , B.OLD_YN /* 중고여부 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('ORG0011', B.OLD_YN) AS OLD_YN_NM /* 중고여부명 */ , B.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM /* 단가만료일시 */ , B.UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM /* 단가적용일시 */ , B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC /* 출고단가 */ , B.MNFCT_GRANT /* 제조사장려금 */ , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'ORG0018' AND CD_VAL = '1') AS MAX_AMT /* 정책보조금 */ , B.REMRK /* 비고 */ FROM CMN_INTM_MDL A , CMN_HNDST_AMT B , ORG_MNFCT_MST C WHERE 1=1 AND A.RPRS_PRDT_ID = B.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND A.MNFCT_ID = C.MNFCT_ID AND ((A.RPRS_YN = 'N' AND PRDT_TYPE_CD = '01') OR (A.RPRS_YN = 'Y' AND PRDT_TYPE_CD <> '01') ) AND B.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM = '99991231235959'
AND A.RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} /* 대표모델ID */
AND A.PRDT_ID = #{prdtId}
AND A.MNFCT_ID = #{mnfctId} /* 제조사ID */
AND A.PRDT_TYPE_CD = #{prdtTypeCd} /* 모델유형코드 */
AND B.OLD_YN = #{oldYn} /* 중고여부 */
AND UPPER(A.PRDT_NM) like '%'||UPPER(#{prdtNm})||'%' /* 모델명 */
ORDER BY A.PRDT_DT DESC, A.PRDT_LNCH_DT DESC, A.RPRS_PRDT_ID DESC, A.PRDT_ID ASC

SELECT /* CmnMdlAmtMgmtMapper.selectRprsHndstOldYnHisList */ A.PRDT_ID /* 모델ID */ , A.RPRS_PRDT_ID /* 대표모델ID */ , A.RPRS_YN /* 대표여부 */ , A.PRDT_CODE /* 모델코드 */ , (SELECT PRDT_CODE FROM CMN_INTM_MDL B WHERE B.PRDT_ID = A.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND RPRS_YN = 'Y') AS RPRS_PRDT_CODE /* 대표모델 코드*/ , A.PRDT_NM /* 모델명 */ , A.MNFCT_ID /* 제조사ID */ , C.MNFCT_NM /* 제조사명 */ , A.PRDT_TYPE_CD /* 모델유형코드 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('ORG0007', A.PRDT_TYPE_CD) AS PRDT_TYPE_NM /* 모델유형명 */ , A.PRDT_IND_CD /* 모델구분코드 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0045', A.PRDT_IND_CD) AS PRDT_IND_NM /* 모델구분명 */ , A.PRDT_LNCH_DT /* 모델출시일자 */ , A.PRDT_DT /* 모델단종일자 */ , A.PRDT_COLR_CD /* 모델색상코드 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0044', A.PRDT_COLR_CD) AS PRDT_COLR_NM /* 모델색상명 */ , B.OLD_YN /* 중고여부 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('ORG0011', B.OLD_YN) AS OLD_YN_NM /* 중고여부명 */ , B.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM /* 단가만료일시 */ , B.UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM /* 단가적용일시 */ , B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC /* 출고단가 */ , B.MNFCT_GRANT /* 제조사장려금 */ , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'ORG0018' AND CD_VAL = '1') AS MAX_AMT /* 정책보조금 */ , B.REMRK /* 비고 */ FROM CMN_INTM_MDL A , CMN_HNDST_AMT B , ORG_MNFCT_MST C WHERE 1=1 AND A.RPRS_PRDT_ID = B.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND A.MNFCT_ID = C.MNFCT_ID AND A.PRDT_DT >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND ((A.RPRS_YN = 'N' AND PRDT_TYPE_CD = '01') OR (A.RPRS_YN = 'Y' AND PRDT_TYPE_CD <> '01') ) AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN SUBSTR(B.UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM, 0, 8 ) AND SUBSTR(B.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM, 0, 8 )
AND A.RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} /* 대표모델ID */
AND A.PRDT_ID = #{prdtId}
AND A.MNFCT_ID = #{mnfctId} /* 제조사ID */
AND A.PRDT_TYPE_CD = #{prdtTypeCd} /* 모델유형코드 */
AND B.OLD_YN = #{oldYn} /* 중고여부 */
AND UPPER(A.PRDT_NM) like '%'||UPPER(#{prdtNm})||'%' /* 모델명 */
ORDER BY A.PRDT_DT DESC, A.PRDT_LNCH_DT DESC, A.RPRS_PRDT_ID DESC, A.PRDT_ID ASC

SELECT /* CmnMdlAmtMgmtMapper.selectRprsHndstOldYnAllHisList */ A.PRDT_ID /* 모델ID */ , A.RPRS_PRDT_ID /* 대표모델ID */ , A.RPRS_YN /* 대표여부 */ , A.PRDT_CODE /* 모델코드 */ , (SELECT PRDT_CODE FROM CMN_INTM_MDL B WHERE B.PRDT_ID = A.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND RPRS_YN = 'Y') AS RPRS_PRDT_CODE /* 대표모델 코드*/ , A.PRDT_NM /* 모델명 */ , A.MNFCT_ID /* 제조사ID */ , C.MNFCT_NM /* 제조사명 */ , A.PRDT_TYPE_CD /* 모델유형코드 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('ORG0007', A.PRDT_TYPE_CD) AS PRDT_TYPE_NM /* 모델유형명 */ , A.PRDT_IND_CD /* 모델구분코드 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0045', A.PRDT_IND_CD) AS PRDT_IND_NM /* 모델구분명 */ , A.PRDT_LNCH_DT /* 모델출시일자 */ , A.PRDT_DT /* 모델단종일자 */ , A.PRDT_COLR_CD /* 모델색상코드 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0044', A.PRDT_COLR_CD) AS PRDT_COLR_NM /* 모델색상명 */ , B.OLD_YN /* 중고여부 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('ORG0011', B.OLD_YN) AS OLD_YN_NM /* 중고여부명 */ , B.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM /* 단가만료일시 */ , B.UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM /* 단가적용일시 */ , B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC /* 출고단가 */ , B.MNFCT_GRANT /* 제조사장려금 */ , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'ORG0018' AND CD_VAL = '1') AS MAX_AMT /* 정책보조금 */ , B.REMRK /* 비고 */ FROM CMN_INTM_MDL A , CMN_HNDST_AMT B , ORG_MNFCT_MST C WHERE 1=1 AND A.RPRS_PRDT_ID = B.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND A.MNFCT_ID = C.MNFCT_ID AND ((A.RPRS_YN = 'N' AND PRDT_TYPE_CD = '01') OR (A.RPRS_YN = 'Y' AND PRDT_TYPE_CD <> '01') ) AND B.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM = '99991231235959'
AND A.RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId} /* 대표모델ID */
AND A.PRDT_ID = #{prdtId}
AND A.MNFCT_ID = #{mnfctId} /* 제조사ID */
AND A.PRDT_TYPE_CD = #{prdtTypeCd} /* 모델유형코드 */
AND B.OLD_YN = #{oldYn} /* 중고여부 */
AND UPPER(A.PRDT_NM) like '%'||UPPER(#{prdtNm})||'%' /* 모델명 */
ORDER BY A.PRDT_DT DESC, A.PRDT_LNCH_DT DESC, A.RPRS_PRDT_ID DESC, A.PRDT_ID ASC
